n suitably updated in the
Master Circular. The list of circulars rescinded vide the instant circular is also
updated in 
 2022
49 SEBI MIRSD email dated March 02, 2022
50 SEBI Email dated September 12, 2022
51 SEBI Email dated December 28, 2022
52 SEBI Letter No. MRD/DoPII/DSAII/OW/2019/ 3662/1 dated February 07, 2019
